opinion.h1: TRYBER v. MCGREGOR CREAMERY ASS'N, 199 U.S. 617 (1905)
opinion.h2: WILLIAM F. TRYBER, Appellant, v. MCGREGOR CREAMERY ASSOCIATION et al. No. 129.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. W. J. Moroney for appellant.
Dismissed with costs, pursuant to the Tenth Rule.[ Tryber v. McGregor Creamery Ass'n 199 U.S. 617 (1905) ]
